title: v1.129.0 RC 1 (New Arch)
summary: Experimental New Arch Build This build contains experimental changes to enable the React Native New Architecture. Thank you for helping us test it out! If you find any bugs, please file a GitHub Issue using the "Bug Report - Fabric/New Architecture" template. Full Changelog : 1.128.0-rc1...1.129.0-rc1
content:
Experimental New Arch Build

This build contains experimental changes to enable the React Native New Architecture. Thank you for helping us test it out! If you find any bugs, please file a GitHub Issue using the "Bug Report - Fabric/New Architecture" template.

Full Changelog: 1.128.0-rc1...1.129.0-rc1
